Am I in an anime ?? Is this Haikyuu ?? This placeтАЩs insane ! You normally donтАЩt get to visit school buildings when youтАЩre in Japan but this one in Magome-juku is accessible ! ItтАЩs an old school repurposed as a hostel and many rooms such as classrooms and the gymnasium can be visited during your stay ! Jk but you def have to visit Kamei Arena Sendai in Sendai, Japan! Just an hour by bullet train and 20 minutes by subway, this is the iconic spot where most Haikyuu matches took place (up until Nationals). ЁЯПР Full video dropping on YouTube this Sunday at 5pm PT, but hereтАЩs a sneak peek from my camera roll! We joined the free tour (in Japanese), and even though my fianc├й doesnтАЩt speak the language, the volunteers had iPads showing which Haikyuu scenes matched each spot in the arena. It was super easy to follow and so impressive! At the end, I wanted to donate to show my appreciation, but they mentioned Haikyuu-themed towels were for sale, and the proceeds support them тАФso of course, I had to grab a few ЁЯТХ Can you believe Kamei Arena is where Karasuno, Aoba Johsai, Dateko, and Shiratorizawa all played? And even MSBY and the Adlers! ЁЯШН For the ULTIMATE Haikyuu pilgrimage, donтАЩt miss the other must-see location in Karumai, Iwate, which inspired HinataтАЩs town in the series. ItтАЩs about four hours from Tokyo one-way, but if youтАЩre a TRUE Haikyuu fan, itтАЩs worth the trip! Have you visited these spots or want to? Let me know your favorite Haikyuu team and character in the comments! ЁЯПР #haikyuu #hq #anime #manga #bokuto #atsumumiya #kuroo

NEW Haikyuu Restaurant in Japan!! ЁЯПР  Haikyuu has teamed up with COCOтАЩs Restaurant with new  merch, themed menu and exclude bonus campaigns around Karasuno (Hinata, Kageyama, Tsukki, Yamaguchi) and Aoba Johsai (Oikawa, Iwaizumi, Matsukawa, Hanamaki).  Several restaurants have standees for photo spots.  My recommendations are Heiwadai (Tokyo), Sendai Nagamachi (Miyagi) and Sendai Yagiyama (Miyagi) branches for their elaborate decorations. They have some really cool decorations other than standees. NEW Haikyuu!! store has popped up in Japan ЁЯЗпЁЯЗ╡ ЁЯПР  This traveling pop-up has been making its way across all 47 prefectures in Japan, and is currently happening in Tokyo before moving to Chiba and Nagasaki! ThereтАЩs SO much merch here ЁЯСА Jerseys, plushies, acrylic stands, keychains, and so much more. And itтАЩs not just Karasuno! YouтАЩll also find merch from Nekoma, Fukurodani, Shiratorizawa, Aoba Johsai, and more! Pop Up Details Haikyuu!!
